---
title: "Marcos Vinícius e Daniel"
image: "logo.png"
links:
  - label: GitHub Marcos
    url: "https://github.com/marcosvinicius31619"
  - label: GitHub Daniel
    url: "https://github.com/danielDFAJ"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:marcosvinicius31619@gmail.com"
  - label: Relatórios
    url: "./relatorio/index.html"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
Cursando engenharia mecatrônica
